name: AULA F2066 II Mechanical Gaming Keyboard

Its durable metal panel , detachable wrist rest , and full anti-ghosting 104-key layout ensure unmatched comfort and performance
Perfect for intense gaming or efficient workflows, this RGB mechanical keyboard is built to last with a 50-million keystroke lifespan and offers macro customization for an optimized experience
